description: Prefix coN-: the nasal assimilates to the following consonant's place (com before labials, con before coronals, cong before dorsals/vowels).
mechanism: PhonologicalRule: nasal place = following C place (archiphoneme N)

description: Prefix iN-: the nasal assimilates to the following consonant's place (im before labials, in before coronals, ing before dorsals/vowels).
mechanism: PhonologicalRule: nasal place = following C place (archiphoneme N)
